failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
),
target_publications AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM publication
    WHERE profile_id = (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
)
SELECT 
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation AS criticism
FROM comment c
JOIN target_publications tp ON c.publication_id = tp.id
WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%criticism%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%bad%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%horrible%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%awful%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%stop%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%disappoint%'
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
),
target_publications AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM publication
    WHERE profile_id = (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
)
SELECT 
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation
FROM comment c
INNER JOIN target_publications tp ON c.publication_id = tp.id
WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%pior%'
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%ruim%'
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%horrível%'
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%odeio%'
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%pare%'
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%decepção%'
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%errado%'
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
